sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Intellicheck CEO Bryan Lewis sells $80,536 in company stock By Investing.com
feed.summary: Intellicheck CEO Bryan Lewis sold 10,000 shares of the company's common stock for $80,536 on April 27, 2026, through a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. This sale occurred despite Intellicheck (NASDAQ:IDN) shares returning 212% over the past year, though they experienced an 8.75% decline last week and InvestingPro analysis suggests they are overvalued. The company recently reported strong Q4 2025 financial results, exceeding revenue and EPS expectations, with analysts reiterating Buy ratings.

feed.title: SCX Brings Sovereign AI to Equinix’s AI Ecosystem and Confirms National Expansion with SambaNova SN50
feed.summary: SouthernCrossAI (SCX), an Australian full-stack sovereign AI infrastructure company, is now providing sovereign AI inferencing capacity to the Equinix Fabric AI ecosystem, making its ASIC-powered inference nodes accessible to enterprises, governments, and developers. SCX's national infrastructure expansion will utilize SambaNova's next-generation SN50 Reconfigurable Dataflow Unit (RDU), the world's fastest AI chip for agentic AI inference, and will roll out across Equinix facilities in Australia throughout 2026 and beyond. This partnership aims to scale Australian AI by making world-class inferencing available domestically and meeting data sovereignty requirements.

feed.title: INVESTOR ALERT: Pomerantz Law Firm Investigates Claims On Behalf of Investors of CarMax, Inc. - KMX
feed.summary: Pomerantz LLP is investigating potential securities fraud claims against CarMax, Inc. on behalf of its investors. The investigation follows a significant drop in CarMax's stock price after the company indicated it would implement lower prices for used cars and increase its appetite for customers with lower credit scores, despite reporting strong fourth-quarter financial results. Investors are advised to contact Pomerantz LLP for information about joining the class action.

feed.title: Palo Alto Networks (PANW) director adds stock award, updates trust holdings
feed.summary: Palo Alto Networks director Aparna Bawa reported receiving 24 shares of common stock as an award, increasing her direct holdings to 2,184 shares. The filing also updated the indirect holdings of The Bawa Family Trust, for which Bawa is a trustee, to 8,632 shares. These shares were acquired as merger consideration from the CyberArk Software Ltd. acquisition and reflect routine compensation and ownership reporting, with no open-market transactions involved.

feed.title: Mizuho raises Centene stock price target to $50 on Q1 results
feed.summary: Mizuho has increased its price target on Centene Corporation (NYSE:CNC) shares to $50 from $41, maintaining a Neutral rating, following strong Q1 2026 results. The company reported adjusted EPS of $3.37 and revenue of $49.94 billion, both surpassing analyst expectations, and raised its 2026 adjusted EPS guidance by 13%. InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock is undervalued, with potential for further upside from risk adjustment revenue.

feed.title: Omnicom Q1 2026 slides: synergies drive margins to 14.8%, EPS beats
feed.summary: Omnicom (NYSE: OMC) reported strong Q1 2026 results, with adjusted EPS of $1.90 beating estimates and revenue of $6.24 billion exceeding forecasts. The company's margins expanded to 14.8%, primarily due to synergies from its Interpublic Group acquisition. Omnicom also aggressively repurchased $2.8 billion in shares and maintains positive guidance for fiscal 2026.

feed.title: FCC Orders Walt Disney Co To File Early Renewal for ABC After Kimmel Sketch
feed.summary: The FCC has ordered The Walt Disney Co., parent company of ABC, to submit early renewal applications for its TV stations after a joke made by late-night talk show host Jimmy Kimmel prompted criticism from President Donald Trump and former First Lady Melania Trump. The order, issued despite licenses not being due for renewal until 2028, is reportedly tied to an ongoing investigation into Disney and ABC for potential rule violations related to diversity, equity, and inclusion, according to the FCC. A Democratic commissioner, Anna Gomez, called the demand "unprecedented, unlawful and going nowhere," suggesting it's a political stunt.

feed.title: Earnings call transcript: CoStar Group beats Q1 2026 EPS forecast, revenue misses
feed.summary: CoStar Group reported strong Q1 2026 earnings, with an EPS of $0.23 significantly beating the forecast of $0.18, though revenue slightly missed expectations at $897 million. The company achieved its 60th consecutive quarter of double-digit revenue growth and saw a modest stock increase in after-hours trading. Key drivers include robust commercial segment performance, anticipated profitability for the residential segment by Q2 2026, and strong ROI for Homes.com subscribers, leading to planned price increases for new members.

feed.title: Corteva, Inc. (NYSE:CTVA) Declares $0.18 Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: Corteva, Inc. (NYSE:CTVA) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.18 per share, which annualizes to $0.72 and represents a yield of about 0.9%. The dividend is well-covered by earnings, with a payout ratio of 20.5%, and the company has consistently increased its dividend for the past five years. Corteva's stock recently traded around $78.95 and institutional investors own approximately 81.5% of the shares.

feed.title: This is Why The Bank of New York Mellon Corporation (BK) is one of Goldman Sachs Top Bank Stocks
feed.summary: The Bank of New York Mellon Corporation (BK) has been identified by Goldman Sachs as a top bank stock to buy, following strong first-quarter 2026 results. Truist Securities reiterated a Buy rating and increased its price target to $148, citing a 13% year-over-year total revenue increase and a 36% rise in net income. Despite this positive outlook, the article also suggests that some AI stocks may offer even greater growth potential in a shorter timeframe.

feed.title: Edison International posts steady profit growth on rising electricity rates
feed.summary: Edison International exceeded first-quarter profit expectations due to increased electricity rates, driven by rising demand from AI data centers, manufacturing, and extreme weather. The utility reaffirmed its 2026 profit guidance of $5.90-$6.20 per share following the dismissal of a shareholder lawsuit. U.S. power consumption is predicted to continue climbing through 2027, fueled largely by AI and crypto data centers, and growing electrification.

feed.title: Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. (NYSE:HLT) Announces $0.15 Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. (NYSE:HLT) announced a quarterly dividend of $0.15 per share, payable June 30, implying a 0.2% yield and a low payout ratio of 6.7%. Despite Q1 adjusted EPS beating estimates at $2.01 and a raised room-revenue growth outlook, the company's shares fell to $323.87 after setting FY2026 and Q2 guidance below consensus. Analysts maintain varied outlooks, with some raising price targets while others caution about Hilton's rich valuation and limited margin for error.

feed.title: Wells Fargo & Company Declares Quarterly Dividend of $0.45 (NYSE:WFC)
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company (NYSE:WFC) declared a quarterly dividend of $0.45 per share, payable on June 1st to shareholders of record on May 8th. This represents an annual payout of $1.80 and a yield of 2.2%, with the company consistently raising its dividend for four consecutive years. Wells Fargo reported Q1 EPS of $1.60, beating estimates, and analysts project $7.75 EPS for next year, indicating strong dividend coverage.

feed.title: Janux Therapeutics Adjusts Board Class Structure for Director
feed.summary: Janux Therapeutics Inc. (JANX) has reclassified director Eric Dobmeier from Class III to Class II on its board to rebalance the director classes. This procedural move ensures the continuity of Dobmeier's service and responsibilities, maintaining balanced staggered terms for stable corporate governance. Despite this, TipRanks' AI Analyst Spark rates JANX as "Neutral" due to weak financial performance, though noting a strong balance sheet and a positive collaboration with BMS.

feed.title: F5 (FFIV) Q2 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: F5 (FFIV) reported robust Q2 2026 results with 11% revenue growth, record cash flow, and raised its fiscal 2026 revenue and EPS outlooks. The company emphasized its strong position in hybrid multicloud, expanding threat landscape, and AI inference inflection, releasing new AI-powered security solutions. F5 highlighted significant competitive gains and growing direct AI sales, while addressing near-term gross margin pressures from elevated memory costs expected to continue into fiscal 2027.

feed.title: Arch quarterly profit surges to $1b
feed.summary: Arch Capital announced a significant surge in its first-quarter profit, reaching $1 billion, nearly double the previous year, with a strong return on equity. The company benefited from reduced corporate expenses due to Bermuda’s corporate income tax regime and a substantial increase in underwriting income, particularly from its reinsurance division. Despite a drop in mortgage insurance underwriting income due to increased delinquencies, the insurance segment returned to profitability.

feed.title: Cisco Unveils Universal Quantum Switch for Multi-Vendor Interoperability
feed.summary: Cisco Systems Inc. has revealed a prototype of a universal quantum switch designed to enable interoperable quantum networking across diverse manufacturers' systems using standard fiber infrastructure. The switch incorporates a patented quantum computing conversion engine that preserves quantum information integrity with minimal fidelity degradation. This development is a foundational step in Cisco's quantum networking framework, aiming to bridge the gap toward practical quantum computers by linking multiple quantum processors.

feed.title: Earnings call transcript: Caesars misses EPS expectations in Q1 2026
feed.summary: Caesars Entertainment (CZR) reported a larger-than-expected Q1 2026 EPS loss of $-0.48 against a forecast of $-0.25, though revenue of $2.9 billion surpassed expectations by 1.75%. Despite the EPS miss, the stock saw a modest 0.96% increase in after-hours trading, driven by the revenue beat and promising future growth prospects in its digital and regional segments. The company plans strategic investments, including the completion of its Tahoe renovation and an iGaming launch in Alberta, alongside a balanced approach to debt reduction and stock repurchases.

feed.title: InflaRx Regains Nasdaq Minimum Bid Price Compliance, Securing Listing Status
feed.summary: InflaRx, a Nasdaq-listed biopharmaceutical company, has regained compliance with the Nasdaq minimum bid price requirement. The company's shares traded at or above $1.00 for ten consecutive business days, resolving a prior delisting threat. This achievement stabilizes InflaRx's market standing and ensures continued access to capital markets for its promising anti-inflammatory drug candidates.

feed.title: Will MetLife’s (MET) New Real Estate Chief and Water Tower Bet Reshape Its Investment Narrative?
feed.summary: MetLife Inc. has appointed Andrea Drasites as global head of Real Estate and Agricultural Finance and committed US$170 million to redevelop Chicago’s Water Tower Place, including potential medical office space conversion. These actions, alongside an ongoing share buyback program, are reshaping MetLife's investment strategy by actively managing its real estate and agricultural investment portfolios. Investors should consider the potential impact of these moves on commercial mortgage loan credit quality and the company's overall earnings and capital story.

feed.title: Johnson Fistel, PLLP Begins Investigation on Behalf of
feed.summary: Johnson Fistel, PLLP has initiated investigations on behalf of long-term shareholders of Hasbro, Inc. (HAS), Humana Inc. (HUM), Ibotta, Inc. (IBTA), and Inspire Medical Systems, Inc. (INSP). The investigations focus on potential breaches of fiduciary duty by officers and directors, stemming from previously filed securities class action complaints alleging false or misleading statements and omissions. Shareholders who held stocks continuously since specific dates prior to the alleged misconduct are encouraged to seek corporate governance reforms.

feed.title: PACCAR posts higher Q1 profit despite lower revenue, deliveries
feed.summary: PACCAR reported a higher first-quarter profit despite a decline in revenue and truck deliveries. The net income rose by 19.8% to $605.3 million, partially due to the absence of a prior-year litigation charge, even as total revenue fell by 8.9% to $6.78 billion. While truck segment revenue and deliveries decreased, the PACCAR Parts segment saw a slight revenue increase, and PACCAR Financial Services maintained strong credit quality despite a dip in pretax income.

feed.title: Director at Abbott Laboratories (NYSE: ABT) receives 2,286-share stock grant
feed.summary: Claire Babineaux-Fontenot, a director at Abbott Laboratories (NYSE: ABT), received a stock grant of 2,286 common shares on April 24, 2026, as a restricted stock unit award. This award, valued at $0.00 per share, increases her direct holdings to 7,603 Abbott common shares. The units will be settled one-for-one in Abbott common shares upon her separation from service, death, or a change in control, as defined by the company's 2026 Incentive Stock Program.

feed.title: Delta shaves Seattle flights to Mexico as fuel costs climb
feed.summary: Delta Air Lines is reducing its flights from Seattle-Tacoma International Airport to Mexico due to rising fuel costs. This move makes Delta the latest airline to cut services from Sea-Tac because of elevated operating expenses. Other airlines have also been facing similar challenges, leading to adjustments in their flight schedules.

feed.title: Katharine Kane Sells 6,125 Shares of Texas Instruments (NASDAQ:TXN) Stock
feed.summary: Katharine Kane, an SVP at Texas Instruments (NASDAQ:TXN), sold 6,125 shares for approximately $1.656 million on April 27th, reducing her stake by 19.55%. This insider sale follows strong Q1 results that beat expectations, prompting analysts to raise price targets for TXN. Despite positive sentiment from recent earnings, insider selling and some analyst caution suggest potential volatility for the stock.

feed.title: Hanmi Financial (NASDAQ:HAFC) Insider Matthew Fuhr Sells 3,300 Shares
feed.summary: Hanmi Financial insider Matthew Fuhr sold 3,300 shares of the company's stock for over $101,000, reducing his stake by 8.85%. This transaction follows the company's strong quarterly earnings report, where Hanmi Financial surpassed analyst expectations for both EPS and revenue and also declared a $0.28 quarterly dividend. Despite the insider sale, the stock is trading near its one-year high, and analysts currently hold a "Hold" rating with an average target price of $32.17.

feed.title: Abbott Laboratories (NYSE: ABT) director awarded 2,286 RSUs
feed.summary: Abbott Laboratories director Nita Ahuja was granted 2,286 restricted stock units (RSUs) with a grant price of $0.00 per share under the company's 2026 Incentive Stock Program. These RSUs will be settled one-to-one in common shares upon Ahuja's separation from service, death, or a change in control. Following this award, Ahuja's direct holdings in Abbott Laboratories now total 2,286 common shares.

feed.title: 3M Company stock (US88579Y1010): Why Google Discover changes matter more now
feed.summary: This article discusses the impact of Google's 2026 Discover Core Update on investors tracking 3M Company stock (US88579Y1010). The update provides personalized, proactive insights into company developments, such as product innovation, legal resolutions, and segment growth, directly to users' mobile feeds. This helps investors stay ahead in the mobile-first investing world, enabling quicker access to critical information for decision-making regarding 3M's performance and strategic direction.

feed.title: A.O. Smith Corp. stock (US0003711006): Why residential water heater demand matters more now
feed.summary: A.O. Smith Corp. (AOS) is heavily reliant on residential water heater demand due to predictable replacement cycles and increasing homeowner preferences for energy-efficient models. The company benefits from an aging U.S. housing stock, governmental incentives, and diversification into commercial and water treatment segments, alongside efficient manufacturing and strategic international growth. Despite risks like inflation and labor shortages, its financial health, dividend consistency, and focus on innovation position it well for future growth in an essential market.

feed.title: Omnicom’s AI Push Sparks Fresh Movement In S&P Today
feed.summary: Omnicom (NYSE: OMC) is leveraging AI to transform marketing campaigns by integrating automation, compliance support, workflow, and data coordination. This focus on AI-driven tools is making fresh movements in the S&P 500 today, with Google Cloud and Adobe being key partners in Omnicom's initiatives. The company operates in the communication services sector, utilizing AI to enhance enterprise marketing workflows and influencer compliance.

feed.title: Ouch: Checked Bags For A Family Of 4 On Southwest Airlines Cost $0 A Year Ago – Now It Costs $360
feed.summary: Southwest Airlines, once known for its complimentary checked bags, now charges $45 for the first and $55 for the second per direction, totaling $360 for a family of four on a round-trip. This shift, influenced by activist investor Elliott Investment Management, has seen the airline introduce assigned seating, extra-legroom options, and basic economy tickets, mirroring practices of legacy carriers. While these changes have alienated some loyal customers, they have significantly boosted Southwest's revenue, leading to profitability in Q1 2026 after post-pandemic struggles.

feed.title: Highwoods Properties (NYSE:HIW) Issues Quarterly Earnings Results, Beats Expectations By $0.71 EPS
feed.summary: Highwoods Properties (NYSE:HIW) announced strong quarterly earnings of $0.84 EPS, surpassing analyst expectations by $0.71, and updated its full-year 2026 guidance. The company declared a quarterly dividend of $0.50, representing an 8.0% yield, and approved a $250 million share buyback program, signaling management's belief that the stock is undervalued. Institutional investors have significantly increased their holdings in HIW, which operates as a publicly traded real estate investment trust focused on Class A office spaces.

feed.title: F5 to Host Analyst and Investor Meeting on May 28, 2026
feed.summary: F5, Inc. (NASDAQ: FFIV) announced it will host its Analyst and Investor Meeting on Thursday, May 28, 2026, at 1:00 pm ET in New York, NY. A live webcast and replay of the event will be available on the investor relations section of f5.com. The company, a global leader in app and API delivery and security, will share insights into its F5 Application Delivery and Security Platform (ADSP).

feed.title: $283M Navy deal lets HII start building for a new U.S. frigate class
feed.summary: HII's Ingalls Shipbuilding has secured a $283 million Navy contract for lead yard support for the new FF(X) frigate class. This contract allows Ingalls to procure long-lead materials, perform design work, and begin pre-construction activities for the first ship, leveraging the proven Legend-class National Security Cutter design. Ingalls has invested over $1 billion in modernization to support this and other shipbuilding programs, with the new frigates being built alongside existing production lines.

feed.title: Equity Residential (NYSE:EQR) Issues Q2 2026 Earnings Guidance
feed.summary: Equity Residential (NYSE:EQR) has issued its Q2 2026 earnings per share (EPS) guidance at $0.98–$1.02, slightly below the consensus. The company also updated its full-year 2026 EPS guidance to $4.02–$4.14, which is in line with analyst expectations. Additionally, Equity Residential announced an increase in its quarterly dividend to $0.7025, resulting in an annualized yield of approximately 4.3%.

feed.title: Insider Selling: Equifax (NYSE:EFX) CEO Sells 37,791 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: Equifax (NYSE:EFX) CEO Mark Begor sold 37,791 shares of the company's stock for approximately $6.52 million on April 24th, reducing his stake by 12.21%. This transaction occurred under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. The company recently reported better-than-expected earnings and raised its quarterly dividend, despite some analyst price target cuts.

feed.title: Ingersoll Rand (NYSE:IR) Updates FY 2026 Earnings Guidance
feed.summary: Ingersoll Rand (NYSE:IR) updated its FY 2026 earnings guidance, projecting EPS between $3.45 and $3.57 and revenue between $7.8 billion and $8.0 billion, aligning with Street estimates. Following the announcement, the stock dropped 3.2% to $81.30, trading below its average target of $98.00. The company also recently declared a quarterly dividend of $0.02 per share and reported insider stock sales totaling over $40 million.

feed.title: Genuine Parts Company to Pay Quarterly Dividend of $1.0625 a Share, Payable July 2 to Shareholders of Record June 5
feed.summary: Genuine Parts Company announced it will pay a quarterly dividend of $1.0625 per share. The dividend is payable on July 2, 2026, to shareholders of record as of June 5, 2026. This news comes amidst recent analyst adjustments to the company's price target and its latest Q1 2026 earnings report.

feed.title: CoStar (NASDAQ:CSGP) Reports Q1 CY2026 In Line With Expectations But Stock Drops
feed.summary: CoStar Group (NASDAQ:CSGP) reported Q1 CY2026 results that met Wall Street's revenue expectations, with sales up 22.5% year-on-year to $897 million, and beat adjusted EPS estimates significantly. Despite meeting revenue guidance and raising full-year adjusted EPS and EBITDA forecasts, the stock dropped 4.6% after the announcement. The article highlights strong new bookings and consistent double-digit revenue growth but notes concerns about a long-term decline in adjusted operating margin and flat EPS performance over the last five years.

feed.title: Clive Bellows Sells 2,800 Shares of Northern Trust (NASDAQ:NTRS) Stock
feed.summary: Clive Bellows, an insider at Northern Trust (NASDAQ:NTRS), sold 2,800 shares of the company's stock on April 24th at an average price of $165.02, totaling approximately $462,056. This transaction reduced his direct holdings by 9.03% to 28,217 shares. The sale followed strong Q1 results where Northern Trust exceeded EPS and revenue expectations, and the company recently declared a $0.80 quarterly dividend.

feed.title: CF Industries Keeps Quarterly Dividend at $0.50 a Share, Payable on May 29 to Shareholders of Record on May 15
feed.summary: CF Industries Holdings, Inc. announced it will maintain its quarterly dividend at $0.50 per share. The dividend is scheduled to be paid on May 29 to shareholders who are on record as of May 15. The company specializes in manufacturing and marketing nitrate and phosphate fertilizers, with primary sales in the United States and Canada.

feed.title: Citizens Financial : Serves as Exclusive Financial Advisor to OrboGraph on its Sale to Kinective
feed.summary: Citizens Capital Markets & Advisory acted as the exclusive financial advisor to OrboGraph in its sale to Kinective, a portfolio company of TA Associates and OceanSound Partners. OrboGraph specializes in AI-powered check recognition and fraud prevention solutions for financial institutions. Both OrboGraph's CEO, Barry Cohen, and Jesse Klein of Thompson Street Capital Partners, majority owner of OrboGraph, praised Citizens' strategic guidance and execution throughout the transaction.

feed.title: Earnings call transcript: Booking Holdings Q1 2026 earnings beat forecasts
feed.summary: Booking Holdings announced Q1 2026 earnings that surpassed analyst expectations for both EPS ($1.14 vs $1.08) and revenue ($5.53 billion vs $5.51 billion). Despite exceeding forecasts, the stock experienced a 2.33% decline in after-hours trading, attributed to broader market trends and geopolitical tensions, particularly the Middle East conflict. The company highlighted resilience, growth in room nights and gross bookings, and continued investment in AI and connected trip initiatives, while also providing Q2 and full-year guidance that accounts for the ongoing geopolitical uncertainties.

feed.title: Becton Dickinson Keeps Quarterly Dividend at $1.05 a Share, Payable on June 30 to Shareholders of Record on June 9
feed.summary: Becton Dickinson (BDX) has announced that it will maintain its quarterly dividend at $1.05 per share. The dividend is scheduled to be paid on June 30, 2026, to shareholders who are on record as of June 9, 2026. This announcement highlights the company's consistent return of value to its shareholders.

feed.title: GM forecasts $500M tariff refund, plans further mitigation efforts
feed.summary: General Motors anticipates a $500 million refund for now-defunct Trump administration tariffs paid last year. Despite this, the automaker still projects tariff costs of $2.5 billion to $3.5 billion in 2026, mainly from Section 232 levies on steel and aluminum. GM is implementing various mitigation strategies, including aluminum hedging and staggered steel supply agreements, to address this ongoing financial burden.

feed.title: Infleqtion Wins $1M Navy Contract For Quantum-Accelerated RF Processing
feed.summary: Infleqtion has been awarded a $1 million contract by the U.S. Navy to further develop its Quantum-Inspired Rapid Context (QuIRC) platform. This Phase II award will integrate self-learning capabilities into QuIRC's Contextual Machine Learning (CML) technology, which reduces computational and storage demands for processing radio frequency (RF) data. The goal is to create an adaptive system for enhanced situational awareness in complex naval operational settings, building on successful initial demonstrations that validated reductions in RF signal storage requirements.

feed.title: Earnings call transcript: Omnicom Group’s Q1 2026 earnings surpass expectations By Investing.com
feed.summary: Omnicom Group reported strong Q1 2026 results, exceeding analyst expectations with EPS of $1.90 and revenue of $6.24 billion. The positive performance, driven by the integration of Interpublic and strategic AI initiatives, led to a 1.14% increase in stock price. The company projects continued growth and significant share repurchases, while actively managing portfolio repositioning and geopolitical risks.

feed.title: Altria Group (NYSE:MO) Trading 2.7% Higher - What's Next?
feed.summary: Altria Group (NYSE:MO) saw its shares rise 2.7% in mid-day trading, reaching $67.7610 after previously closing at $66.00. Analysts expect a modest Q1 beat driven by pricing strength and cost control, despite ongoing declines in smokeable product volumes. The company recently announced a quarterly dividend of $1.06 per share, to be paid on April 30th.

feed.title: Preferred dividends of Immunic, Inc. – GETTEX:10V
feed.summary: This article provides financial information for Immunic, Inc. (GETTEX:10V), specifically focusing on preferred dividends. It details the period, value, and change percentage related to these dividends. The content appears to be a financial data snippet from TradingView.

feed.title: MetLife Raises Quarterly Dividend to $0.5925 a Share From $0.5675, Payable June 9 to Holders of Record May 12
feed.summary: MetLife announced an increase in its quarterly dividend to $0.5925 per share, up from $0.5675. This dividend is payable on June 9 to shareholders of record as of May 12. The company's stock currently trades at $78.28, reflecting recent changes.
